title: Verify eligible user sees Trial Corner widget on Day 0/1
description: Test that a user who has not watched content for 5 mins post-trial activation sees the persistent header widget on Day 0 and Day 1 of their trial.
preconditions: User has an active trial for 0-1 days
User has not watched content for more than 5 minutes

steps.description: 3. Observe the header area of the screen

expected_result: A high-visibility widget with a shield/clock icon and text 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining. Manage Control Center →' is displayed.
